g.text: Copy a host file/folder into the container
Install paseo (drive agents from your phone)
Show paseo pairing QR code (connect your phone)
Add hostnames to the egress allowlist
Send a test notification to host
Destroy/Reset introdus-brave-swift-otter and permanently wipe its /home/dev volume (repo, node_modules,
press a key to run · / filter · ↑/↓ move · Enter select · Esc detach · Ctrl-a ⟨n⟩ windows
